title: Treaty of Alliance between His Majesty, in respect of the United Kingdom, and His Majesty the King of Egypt [with an Agreed Minute thereto, three Notes, Notes exchanged in Egypt on August 12, 1936, and an Oral Declaration made by the President of the Egyptian Council of Minister on August 10, 1936] AND a Convention concerning the Immunities and Privileges to be enjoyed by the British Forces in Egypt
subject: PRIVILEGES & IMMUNITIES
